title: Self-improving AI, Opus 4.8, Nvidia bangers, game-ready 3D models, juggling robots: AI NEWS
summary: An AI news video covering recent releases including Claude Opus 4.8, Step 3.7 Flash, DeepSWE, MiniCPM5, and multiple research projects in vision, robotics, and physics simulation.
